channel.title: Michael Toohig’s Blog
channel.description: I showcase my work and hobby projects and write posts about things I learn.

item.title: Custom Extensions for Directus
item.description: How to get started with self-hosting Directus and write custom extensions.

item.title: Design of a Web Scraper
item.description: The high-level overview of a custom web scraper.

item.title: VMGD API
item.description: An unofficial API for Vanuatu Meteorology Services.

item.title: Vanuatu Energy Dashboard
item.description: An open source dashboard on Vanuatu's energy sources and prices from information obtained in public records.

item.title: Automating PDF Hyperlinks
item.description: Improving efficiency by rebuilding lost hyperlinks

item.title: Scraping PDFs With Computer Vision
item.description: Using OpenCV to scrape figures from PDF files.

item.title: Astro@v1 is not mature
item.description: Astro v1 is more difficult to work with than its beta version.

item.title: Integrating A New Subscriber Management System
item.description: Writing the glue to tie two different systems under one managment software.

item.title: Migrating to Astro
item.description: Detailing the process I experienced migrating this site from Vitepress to Astro and how I got to `yet another framework`.

item.title: OG Tags and Facebook Issues
item.description: Painful workarounds to accommodate Facebook's web crawler

item.title: FastAPI Is Not Mature
item.description: FastAPI and its ecosystem is touted for more than it is ready for.

item.title: Thumbor
item.description: Integrating Thumbor image thumbnail service into Bilolok.

item.title: Bilolok
item.description: A Foursqaure inspired app for kava bars in Port Vila, Vanuatu.

item.title: Remote Video Monitoring
item.description: Automated Post-STB QoS monitoring with a RaspberryPi

item.title: 1NOMO
item.description: An automated linear TV channel broadcast FTA in Port Vila, Vanuatu.
